subcodes.first_line: Your letter was perused, and its contents became manifest and evident. That which hath befallen you hath been for God's sake [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات قرائت شد و ما فیه مشهود و معلوم گشت آنچه بر شما وارد لاجل الله بوده
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
